content:
# OpenCode Providers - Documentação Completa

## Visão Geral
OpenCode suporta 75+ provedores LLM via AI SDK e Models.dev. Suporta modelos locais.

Para adicionar um provider: (1) Adicionar API keys via /connect, (2) Configurar no opencode.json.

Credentials armazenadas em ~/.local/share/opencode/auth.json.

## Config
Customizar baseURL:
```json
{ "provider": { "anthropic": { "options": { "baseURL": "https://api.anthropic.com/v1" } } } }
```

## OpenCode Zen
Modelos testados e verificados pela equipe OpenCode. /connect selecionar OpenCode Zen, ir em opencode.ai/auth, copiar API key, colar. /models para ver modelos.

## OpenCode Go
$5 primeiro mês, $10/mês. Modelos open source curados. /connect selecionar OpenCode Go.

## Directory de Provedores

### 302.AI
Criar conta em 302.ai, gerar API key, /connect search "302.AI", models.

### Amazon Bedrock
Requer acesso ao model catalog. Auth: env vars (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_PROFILE, AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK) ou config file (region, profile, endpoint).
Precedência: Bearer Token > AWS Credential Chain.
Suporta VPC endpoints e custom inference profiles.

### Anthropic
/connect select Anthropic. Suporta Claude Pro/Max via OAuth ou API key manual.

### Atomic Chat
Provider custom para modelos locais. BaseURL http://127.0.0.1:1337/v1. Usar @ai-sdk/openai-compatible.

### Azure OpenAI
Resource name + API key + deployment. /connect search "Azure", set AZURE_RESOURCE_NAME.

### Azure Cognitive Services
Similar Azure OpenAI, resource name + API key. AZURE_COGNITIVE_SERVICES_RESOURCE_NAME.

### Baseten
Conta em baseten.co, API key, /connect, models.

### Cerebras
Console cerebras.ai, API key, /connect, modelos como Qwen 3 Coder 480B.

### Cloudflare AI Gateway
Account ID + Gateway ID + API token. Unified billing. /connect.

### Cloudflare Workers AI
Account ID + API token. REST API direta. /connect.

### Cortecs
Console cortecs.ai, API key, /connect, modelo Kimi K2 Instruct.

### DeepSeek
Platform deepseek.com, API key, /connect, modelos DeepSeek V4 Pro.

### Deep Infra
Dashboard deepinfra.com, API key, /connect.

### Firmware
Dashboard firmware.ai, API key, /connect.

### Fireworks AI
Console fireworks.ai, API key, /connect, modelo Kimi K2 Instruct.

### GitLab Duo (Experimental)
Requer assinatura Premium/Ultimate. OAuth ou PAT. Modelos: duo-chat-haiku-4-5, duo-chat-sonnet-4-5, duo-chat-opus-4-5. Suporta Self-Hosted com GITLAB_INSTANCE_URL. DAP Workflow Models via Duo Workflow Service.

### GitHub Copilot
/connect search GitHub Copilot. Login via github.com/login/device.

### Google Vertex AI
GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT + GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS ou gcloud auth. VERTEX_LOCATION opcional.

### Groq
Console groq.com, API key, /connect.

### Hugging Face
Token com permissão Inference Providers. /connect. Modelos: Kimi-K2-Instruct, GLM-4.6.

### Helicone
LLM observability platform. API key, /connect. Suporta custom headers, caching, session tracking via plugin opencode-helicone-session.

### llama.cpp
Provider custom via llama-server. BaseURL http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1. @ai-sdk/openai-compatible.

### IO.NET
17 modelos. Console io.net, API key, /connect.

### LM Studio
Provider custom. BaseURL http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1. @ai-sdk/openai-compatible.

### Moonshot AI
Moonshot AI console, API key, /connect, modelo Kimi K2.

### MiniMax
Console minimax.io, API key, /connect, modelo M2.1.

### NVIDIA
build.nvidia.com grátis. API key, /connect. Suporta NIM on-prem com baseURL custom.

### Nebius Token Factory
Console tokenfactory.nebius.com, API key, /connect.

### Ollama
Local. BaseURL http://localhost:11434/v1. Auto-configuravel. @ai-sdk/openai-compatible. Aumentar num_ctx se tool calls falharem (16k-32k).

### Ollama Cloud
Ollama.com, API key, /connect. Necessário ollama pull antes.

### OpenAI
/connect select OpenAI. Suporta ChatGPT Plus/Pro via OAuth ou API key manual.

### OpenRouter
Dashboard openrouter.ai, API key, /connect. Suporta provider ordering e fallbacks.

### LLM Gateway
Dashboard llmgateway.io, API key, /connect.

### SAP AI Core
40+ modelos. Service key JSON do SAP BTP Cockpit. /connect. Suporta deployment ID e resource group.

### STACKIT
Sovereign hosting EU. Auth token do portal STACKIT. /connect.

### OVHcloud AI Endpoints
Panel OVHcloud, API key, /connect.

### Scaleway
Console Scaleway IAM, API key, /connect.

### Together AI
Console together.ai, API key, /connect.

### Venice AI
Console venice.ai, API key, /connect.

### Vercel AI Gateway
Dashboard Vercel, API key, /connect. Suporta provider routing order.

### xAI
Console x.ai, API key, /connect, modelo Grok Beta.

### Z.AI
Console Z.AI, API key, /connect. Suporta GLM Coding Plan.

### ZenMux
Dashboard ZenMux, API key, /connect.

## Custom Provider
Para qualquer provider OpenAI-compatible não listado:
1. /connect scroll to "Other"
2. Enter unique provider ID
3. Enter API key
4. Configurar opencode.json:
```json
{
  "provider": {
    "myprovider": {
      "npm": "@ai-sdk/openai-compatible",
      "name": "Display Name",
      "options": { "baseURL": "https://api.myprovider.com/v1" },
      "models": { "my-model": { "name": "Display" } }
    }
  }
}
```
Opções: apiKey, headers, limit.context, limit.output.

## Troubleshooting
- `opencode auth list` para verificar credenciais
- Provider ID no /connect deve match com config
- Usar npm package correto (@ai-sdk/openai-compatible para /v1/chat/completions, @ai-sdk/openai para /v1/responses)
- Verificar baseURL
